title: Moving connected items between Workspaces via automation
excerpt: the ability to move an item with mirror columns to a board in another workspace, using automation

posts.author: Olga.S (Olga Shulkin)
posts.cookedHtml: the ability to move an item with mirror columns to a board in another workspace, using automation

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s currently available. You’ll just need to make sure that the connected column is also on the board in the other workspace that you’re moving it to.

posts.author: Olga.S (Olga Shulkin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, i did it, but still not working. Monday’s technical support told that the automation not supporting moving items including mirror columns between workspaces. only inside the same workspace

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Olga.S

Have you tried this automation from Subitem Automations? I know your goal is to “move” items between workspaces, but this automation is going to copy the item and all its subitems to another board – carrying over all column data if the column names and column types on the destination board match those from the source board.

image2286×724 56.6 KB

Please let me know if that helps. I’m happy to answer any questions you might have!

Cheers,
Kevin | Fantasy Media Team
